title: pentanema helenioides
intro: Pentanema helenioides, also known as Helen's yellow fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pentanema helenioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma.
